title: Dvd Repackaging Project aka Wallet Impact
display_title: Dvd Repackaging Project aka Wallet Impact
wikitext:
[]: Dvd Repackaging Project aka Wallet Impact!             Quote Post by skikes » Thu Jul 30, 2009 9:36 pm Which version of NGE do you own? I own this one: I think its a uk exclusive, not sure.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jul 30, 2009 9:53 pm Can't be. I own that one too, and I'm from the U.S. of A. Of course, I ordered from the internet. Who know where it actually came from. But I don't remember the little pictures displayed to the sides of that metal box photographed...

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Thu Jul 30, 2009 9:59 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Can't be. I own that one too, and I'm from the U.S. of A. Of course, I ordered from the internet. Who know where it actually came from. But I don't remember the little pictures displayed to the sides of that metal box photographed...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 30, 2009 10:03 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Can't be. I own that one too, and I'm from the U.S. of A.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Thu Jul 30, 2009 10:13 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Can't be. I own that one too, and I'm from the U.S. of A.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Jul 30, 2009 10:14 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I'm curious, does anyone own THIS version? Neon Genesis Evangelion: Complete Platinum Collection (Limited Edition Holiday Special) http://www.amazon.com/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Complete-Collection/dp/B001GTFP1I/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&s=dvd&qid=1249009353&sr=8-1

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jul 30, 2009 10:24 pm I have the "Perfect Collection" that I bought for $40 off a guy who was disappointed he couldn't sell it at Gamestop in the mall. xP

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jul 30, 2009 10:25 pm The platinum tin box. The Eva Monkey wrote: I'm curious, does anyone own THIS version? Neon Genesis Evangelion: Complete Platinum Collection (Limited Edition Holiday Special) http://www.amazon.com/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Complete-Collection/dp/B001GTFP1I/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&s=dvd&qid=1249009353&sr=8-1

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Thu Jul 30, 2009 11:01 pm I have the platinum Complete thin-pack (just the episodes)

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Jul 30, 2009 11:44 pm Sachi_13 wrote: I have the "Perfect Collection" that I bought for $40 off a guy who was disappointed he couldn't sell it at Gamestop in the mall. xP

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Thu Jul 30, 2009 11:50 pm schismatics wrote: Sachi_13 wrote: I have the "Perfect Collection" that I bought for $40 off a guy who was disappointed he couldn't sell it at Gamestop in the mall. xP

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Jul 30, 2009 11:51 pm scarmullet wrote: I bought mine twice (for $50 each) because the first one was stolen by an ex-roommate the day I got it.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Fri Jul 31, 2009 12:17 am schismatics wrote: scarmullet wrote: I bought mine twice (for $50 each) because the first one was stolen by an ex-roommate the day I got it.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Fri Jul 31, 2009 12:40 am Got the platinum thinpack at a store. That was before I learned about buying stuff from teh internetz.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Jul 31, 2009 12:54 am I was given the Perfect Collection for free buy this guy at an anime store. I bought a $50 box set and i could get another box set for free.

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Fri Jul 31, 2009 6:11 am The Platinum Limited Edition Box (Italian), 8 DVD, PAL progressive. The picture quality is even slightly better than the original Renewal and the dub is pretty good, way better than the English one. scarmullet wrote: I bought mine twice (for $50 each)

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jul 31, 2009 6:56 am I bought mine on Amazon for like $30 or $35 dollars. I don't remember exactly but it was one of those two or within the price range.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jul 31, 2009 7:43 am schismatics wrote: Sachi_13 wrote: I have the "Perfect Collection" that I bought for $40 off a guy who was disappointed he couldn't sell it at Gamestop in the mall. xP

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Fri Jul 31, 2009 8:07 am As I nodded along to this thread, I came to hate myself.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Fri Jul 31, 2009 8:20 am I have this for the complete series and movies: NEON GENESIS EVANGELION DVD-BOX '07 EDITION http://www.amazon.co.jp/NEON-GENESIS-EVANGELION-DVD-BOX-07/dp/B000PGTEGA/ref=sr_1_7?ie=UTF8&s=dvd&qid=1249045934&sr=1-7 I'd like to know why it started releasing a creepy red-colored powder less than two years after I got it... I touched one of the DVD cases and my fingers came out RED... dundundun... I also have some local releases for things like the movies.
